name: Lemon Sponge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs.
2. Beat egg whites and 1/3 of the sugar until stiff peaks form.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks with the remaining sugar, salt, grated lemon rind, and lemon juice until thick.
4. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the yolk mixture in the bowl over hot water until combined.
5. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
6. Brown lightly in an oven preheated to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
